CVE-2020-36774.title: plugins/gtk+/glade-gtk-box.c in GNOME Glade before 3.38.1 and 3.3 ...
CVE-2020-36774.description: plugins/gtk+/glade-gtk-box.c in GNOME Glade before 3.38.1 and 3.39.x before 3.40.0 mishandles widget rebuilding for GladeGtkBox, leading to a denial of service (application crash).
